pi_items.verified_value: CONFIRMED: TaskDetailActivity.kt line 30 has 'private val repository = TaskRepository()' (separate instance from other Activities); lines 80-87 contain inline status update logic

pi_items.metadata_value: State is lost on configuration changes (screen rotation) because Activities directly hold mutable state
pi_items.verified_value: CONFIRMED: currentFilter and sortByPriority fields in TaskListActivity are instance variables that would be lost on rotation without savedInstanceState handling
pi_items.source: Code inspection - Activities have no onSaveInstanceState() or ViewModel-based persistence

pi_items.metadata_value: build.gradle.kts lacks lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx, lifecycle-livedata-ktx, and activity-ktx dependencies
pi_items.verified_value: CONFIRMED: Current app/build.gradle.kts (lines 44-54) only contains androidx.core, androidx.appcompat, material, androidx.constraintlayout, androidx.recyclerview dependencies. No lifecycle or activity-ktx dependencies present

pi_items.metadata_value: TaskRepository provides methods like getAllTasks(), getTasksByStatus(), getCompletionStats(), getOverdueTasks(), getTotalEstimatedHours(), addTask(), updateTask()
pi_items.verified_value: CONFIRMED: TaskRepository class provides all these methods as public functions. It is an in-memory repository with sample data seeding.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task is a data class with fields: id, title, description, priority (Priority enum), status (TaskStatus enum), dueDate, createdAt, tags, estimatedHours
pi_items.verified_value: CONFIRMED: Task.kt defines a data class with exactly these fields. Priority has LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL values. TaskStatus has PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED values.

privileged_info_summary: The TaskManagerApp is a synthetic task management application with three Activities (TaskListActivity, AddTaskActivity, TaskDetailActivity), each holding a separate TaskRepository instance and implementing business logic inline—the classic 'God Activity' anti-pattern. The codebase currently lacks lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx (2.7.0), lifecycle-livedata-ktx (2.7.0), and activity-ktx (1.8.2) dependencies needed for MVVM refactoring. The data source contains an in-memory repository with sample tasks seeded at initialization. The app uses Kotlin with AndroidX support libraries for UI components (RecyclerView, AppCompatActivity). All stated problems (state loss on rotation, untestable activities, non-shared repository instances) are accurately represented in the code.
